title: Copycats Are Too Heavy
description: Reduce Copycats block mass to 1/4 for Sable
body:
# Copycats Are Too Heavy

A small Minecraft data pack for players using **Copycats+** with **Sable**.

By default, Copycats blocks can be extremely heavy in Sable physics setups. This data pack reduces supported Copycats block mass to **1/4**, making contraptions easier to move and less punishing to build with.

## Features

- Reduces supported Copycats block mass to `1/4`
- Provides Sable `physics_block_properties` data for Copycats blocks
- Targets Minecraft `1.21.1`
- Lightweight data pack with no code

## Requirements

- Minecraft `1.21.1`
- Sable
- Copycats+
